untranslatable_reason: Cup formation detection requires pattern recognition logic unavailable in the allowed indicators. Specifically: (1) identifying three consecutive days where the middle day has the lowest low or close, (2) confirming this is the lowest point of a downtrend (requires historical context beyond lookback), and (3) tracking entry window timing (within 3 days of formation). The allowed operators (>, <, >=, <=, ==, crosses_above, crosses_below, is) and indicators cannot express the multi-bar sequential pattern matching required for this technical chart pattern.
translation_notes: This signal requires custom pattern detection logic. A backtest engine would need to implement a dedicated cup_formation() function that scans for the specific 3-day candlestick arrangement and downtrend context. Suggest implementing as a custom indicator or external pattern scanner rather than JSON rule logic.
